title: Gel-bath
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''gel-bath''' was a small, portable version of a [[Bacta tank/Legends|bacta tank]], little more than a deep pan that one could submerge injured extremities in. The [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] had one during [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian's]] proprietorship of the vessel, left there by a previous owner. Calrissian used it to save his feet from frostbite after being left out in the [[lifetree]] orchards on [[Rafa V]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
